hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Asking For & Offering Help at Work
lesson.menu_desc: Offer help and ask for help with can and can't -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Asking For & Offering Help at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 16 -- Asking For & Offering Help at Work

listenings.text: Hi team, this is Daniel. I have a quick message about the new spreadsheet. I know some of you cannot open the file yet. Do not worry. I can help. If you cannot access the folder, send me a message and I can fix it today. I can also support the new colleagues this week. Please do not struggle alone. I am a little busy in the morning, but I can call you in the afternoon. We can figure out every problem together. Thank you.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for your message. I can open the spreadsheet now, but I cannot find the supplier list. Can you help me with that? I do not want to struggle for hours. Also, our new colleague cannot access the shared folder. Can you support him today? I am busy until noon, but I can call you after lunch. I am sure we can manage this and figure it out together. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: Can you help me with the report? I cannot open the file. I am a little busy now, but I can call you later. Do not struggle alone. I can fix it, and we can figure it out together.
